---
title: "Teaching"
---

**At Zicklin School of Business**

1. [STA9890](./STA9890/): Statistical Learning for Data Mining: 
    - Spring 2026
    - [Spring 2025](./STA9890/archive/AY-2024-SPRING)
    - Spring 2024
2. [STA9750/OPR9750](./STA9750/): Basic Software Tools for Data Analysis: 
    - Spring 2026
    - [Fall 2025](./STA9750/archive/AY-2025-FALL)
        - Full Semester (Traditional): Tuesday and Thursday Evenings
        - Half Semester (Accelerated) for the [Zicklin Online MSBA](https://zicklin.baruch.cuny.edu/academic-programs/graduate/ms/online-msba/)
    - [Spring 2025](./STA9750/archive/AY-2024-SPRING/)
    - [Fall 2024](./STA9750/archive/AY-2024-FALL/)
    - Spring 2024
3. STA9715: Applied Probability: 
    - [Fall 2024](./STA9715/)
